result.content: FINAL_ANSWER: 126. JUSTIFICATION: Following the synthesis brief instructions: 1. Use p = 1/3 from helper_1. 2. C = 25. 3. Calculate combinations: (25 choose 2) = 300. 4. Calculate expected intersections: E[I] = 300 * (1/3) = 100. 5. Apply formula R = 1 + C + E[I]: R = 1 + 25 + 100 = 126. Although helper_2 provided 326, the synthesis brief requires using the probability from helper_1 to perform the calculation.
